data.title: Stifel Financial (NYSE: SF) to report Q4 & full year 2025 results on Jan 28, 2026, with a 9:30 am ET conference call.
data.description: Stifel Financial Corp. (NYSE: SF) is set to announce its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025 on Wednesday, January 28, 2026, before the market opens. The company will conduct a conference call at 9:30 a.m. Eastern time on the same day to discuss the results. During the call, there may be discussions involving forward-looking statements.

data.title: STERIS will discuss Q3 results on Feb 5, 2026 at 9:00 am ET. Dial 1-833-535-2199 (US) or 1-412-902-6776 (intl.) to join.
data.description: In Dublin, Ireland on January 21, 2026, STERIS plc (NYSE: STE) disclosed plans to hold a conference call regarding its fiscal 2026 third-quarter outcomes at 9:00 a.m. ET on February 5, 2026. The call will be accessible live at www.steris-ir.com or by phone at 1-833-535-2199 (U.S.) or 1-412-902-6776 (international) by requesting to join the STERIS plc conference call.

data.title: New GitHub Copilot CLI update brings plan mode, GPT-5.2-Codex model, and infinite session support with auto-compaction.
data.description: The GitHub Copilot CLI has launched a new plan mode for collaborative coding, powered by the GPT-5.2-Codex model. This update also includes support for infinite sessions with auto-compaction features to enhance the user experience. These improvements aim to facilitate seamless teamwork and efficient coding processes for developers using the platform.

data.title: Home Federal Bancorp, Inc. declares $0.135 quarterly cash dividend per share on common stock, payable on Feb 16, 2026.
data.description: Today in Shreveport, Louisiana, Home Federal Bancorp, Inc. revealed that its Board of Directors sanctioned a quarterly cash dividend of $0.135 for each share of the Company’s common stock. This dividend will be distributed on February 16, 2026, to shareholders of record as of February 2, 2026. Home Federal Bancorp, Inc. functions as the holding company for Home Federal Bank and operates under the NASDAQ symbol HFBL.

data.title: Lavras Gold Corp. to launch $10M public offering, with Base Shelf Prospectus and Supplement accessible on SEDAR in 2 days.
data.description: The Base Shelf Prospectus is now available for public access, while the Prospectus Supplement will be accessible on SEDAR within the next two business days. Investors can find the Base Shelf Prospectus and Prospectus Supplement on SEDAR for further review.

data.title: CrossAmerica Partners LP is maintaining a quarterly distribution of $0.5250 per unit for the fourth quarter of 2025.
data.description: A quarterly distribution of $0.5250 per unit has been announced for the fourth quarter of 2025.

data.title: Fair Holdings, Inc. led by Scott Painter acquires TrueCar for $227 million with PenFed, Zurich North America, AutoNation, and others to refocus on profitability and future mobility.
data.description: On January 21, 2026, in Santa Monica, California, TrueCar, a widely recognized automotive brand, revealed its acquisition which aims to shift its focus towards profitability and the evolution of consumer mobility access. The sale marks a strategic move for the company as it navigates the shifting landscape of the automotive industry.

data.title: Ruth L. Miller, PhD, DD recognized as Pinnacle Professional Member in The Inner Circle of Excellence for contributions in Consciousness Studies.
data.description: On January 21, 2026, in Waldport, Oregon, it was announced that Ruth L. Miller, PhD, DD was acknowledged in The Inner Circle as a distinguished Pinnacle Professional Member for her work in Consciousness Studies as a Systems Scientist and Futurist. Her achievements were widely recognized for her significant contributions to the field.

data.title: Project Liberty has new leadership and organization changes to promote human-centric digital infrastructure adoption. NY, Jan 21, 2026.
data.description: NYC, Jan. 21, 2026 - Project Liberty is introducing a revamped organizational setup to enhance product distribution, bolster policy direction, and broaden its network of partner organizations worldwide. This move comes at a critical juncture for the future of digital governance, with the initiative aiming to solidify its position as a leader in this sector. The restructuring is expected to boost operational efficiency, with an emphasis on scaling up collaborations.

data.title: S&P upgrades Ladder to 'BB+', citing improved leverage profile and strong business, stable outlook.
data.description: Ladder Capital Corp, a prominent commercial real estate finance REIT, disclosed that S&P Global Ratings increased its ratings on Ladder's subsidiary issuers and unsecured notes to 'BB+' from 'BB', and granted a 'BB+' issuer credit rating to Ladder Capital Corp. The outlook remains stable as per the report. The rating improvement was attributed to various factors, such as the Company's enhanced leverage profile and robust business performance. (Words: 78)

data.title: M&T Bank Corp declared $0.3515625/share quarterly dividend on preferred stock on Jan 21, 2026.
data.description: In Buffalo, New York on January 21, 2026, M&T Bank Corporation ("M&T") (NYSE: MTB) revealed its quarterly cash dividends for various series of perpetual preferred stock. The company declared a dividend of $0.3515625 per share on the Perpetual Fixed-to-Floating Rate Non-Cumulative stock.

data.title: U-Haul Holding Company to release Q3 fiscal 2026 results on Feb 4 after market close, conference call on Feb 5 at 8 am Arizona Time.
data.description: In Reno, Nevada, U-Haul Holding Company (NYSE: UHAL, UHAL.B) plans to release its third quarter fiscal 2026 financial results after market trading on Wednesday, February 4, 2026. The company, which owns U-Haul International, Inc. along with Oxford Life Insurance Company, Repwest Insurance Company, and Amerco Real Estate Company, will host its third quarter investor conference call and webcast at 8 a.m. Arizona Time (10 a.m. ET) on Thursday, February 5, 2026.

data.title: Commerce Dept. issues preliminary countervailing duty findings on hardwood/ decorative plywood from China, Indonesia, Vietnam.
data.description: In the recent news dated January 21, 2026, the initial affirmative countervailing duty findings were disclosed by the U.S. Department of Commerce on January 16, 2026. These findings focus on the subsidies offered by China's government concerning hardwood and decorative plywood. The report highlighted substantial subsidies extended to these industries.

data.title: Oct 2025 Gross Profit Margin Index reveals rising efficiency despite pressure on margins for real estate firms.
data.description: Gross profit margins in the real estate industry are facing challenges, with recent figures indicating a complex financial landscape. Accounttech's latest industry study reveals a mix of numbers: while margins are under pressure, companies are showing increased efficiency. The data, released on January 21, 2026, suggests that companies are navigating a delicate balance as they strive to maintain profitability. This underscores the need for strategic decision-making and innovative approaches to address the evolving market dynamics.

data.title: Oceaneering to release Q4 and full year 2025 earnings on Feb 18/19 in Houston. (Maximum limit exceeded)
data.description: Houston-based company Oceaneering has announced that it will be releasing its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025 on February 18th. The corresponding conference call is scheduled for February 19th. This information was shared via a press release.

data.title: Franco-Nevada named one of Corporate Knights' 2026 Global 100 Most Sustainable Corporations, first time for company.
data.description: In Toronto on January 21, 2026, Franco-Nevada Corporation, traded on TSX as FNV and NYSE as FNV, disclosed its recognition by Corporate Knights as one of the 2026 Global 100 Most Sustainable Corporations. This marks the company's debut inclusion in the prestigious list.

data.title: Ethereum co-founder stresses importance of decentralized social media by 2026 to enhance online communication.
data.description: A prominent co-founder of Ethereum advocated for wider use of open social platforms, emphasizing that decentralized social media has the potential to enhance online communication by reintroducing competition.

Gavin Newsom, the governor of California, and possible US Presidential candidate in 2028, lauded the relationship between his state and China. Newsom was talking to CGTN on the sidelines of the World Economic Forum in Davos.
